scene_title: Robo em linha de montagem visto de cima
narrative_beat: Bracos de robo dourado carmesim em tarefa precisa

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid humanoid robot in gold and crimson seen from aerial angular perspective with arms extended in precise task execution surrounded by mechanical parts in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the robot's arms extended in precise task execution from above
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated aerial view of industrial warehouse with metal structures in background
props: humanoid robot in gold and crimson from aerial view

mood.emotion: robotic labor as fulfillment of delegated authority

symbolism.primary: the image executing tasks — given authority over daily human work
symbolism.secondary: top-down perspective as divine vantage seeing the pattern from above

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only
